parameters.responseBody:
=<Response>
  <Say voice="alice">Thanks, {{$json.first_name}}. How can I help you today?</Say>
  <Gather input="speech" timeout="5" action="/webhook/twilio/voice/walk/handle?fname={{$json.first_name}}&lname={{$json.last_name}}&idstatus=confirmed" method="POST">
    <Say voice="alice">Please briefly tell me what you need help with.</Say>
  </Gather>
  <Say voice="alice">I didn't catch that. Please try calling again.</Say>
</Response>

<Response>
  <Say voice="alice">I wasn't able to verify your identity, but I can still help. What do you need assistance with?</Say>
  <Gather input="speech" timeout="5" action="/webhook/twilio/voice/walk/handle?idstatus=unverified" method="POST">
    <Say voice="alice">Please briefly tell me what you need help with.</Say>
  </Gather>
  <Say voice="alice">I didn't catch that. Please try calling again.</Say>
</Response>
